meaning: n.[生化]胍(用于有机合成、制药等)
examples: Chaotropic agents, such as urea and guanidine are capable of bringing some hydrophobic compounds into aqueous solutions.
Guanidine Hydrochloride was used as positive control.
Pinellin dissociated into subunits in the presence of sodium dodecyl sulfate or guanidine hydrochloride.
